Intel does not publish Gaudi2 compute performance in directly comparable dense-TFLOPS terms the way NVIDIA/AMD do (marketing relies on MLPerf benchmark results instead). TFLOPS fields deliberately left blank rather than estimated; memory bandwidth/capacity only.
